input: I am near Sary-Tash, Kyrgyzstan. Planning to cross to Tajikistan tomorrow.
expected_output: Road conditions near Kyzyl-Art pass: heavy rain reported 2 days ago. Mud risk: HIGH. Recommend waiting 24h or taking alternate route via Osh. Border opens at 09:00, closes 17:00. Fuel: last station 80km back.
